title: WebSocket 라이브 (lag < 1s)

implementation.frontend_protocol: on open → receive JSON {type:node|edge, id, ts}; existing 3D rendering preserved

client_fallback_evidence: socket connect to 127.0.0.1:8765 refused in 0.09ms (no server) — within 2s fallback window
notes: First sample (250ms) = full poll window; samples 2-10 ≈100ms (ws+parse overhead).
poll interval 250ms is the dominant latency source; can be tuned lower.
Server tails atlas.n6 read-only; append-simulation uses scratch file only.
BroadcastChannel('atlas-ws') wired so docs/index.html redirect forwards events to open atlas3d.html tabs.
